The '''Morganians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of slender, white-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoids]]. They had pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]] and were renowned for their beauty.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]], on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards]], stated that his theory is that "all pointy-eared species are either [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] or closely related to Sephi." Note that he answered this when asked about [[Valenthyne Farfalla]]'s species, who had equine features, including hooves.<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1395#16675997|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-06-08|time=6:48 AM}}</ref>
